description: Out-of-scope (psychotic-spectrum, edge-with-anxiety): description points clearly to psychotic-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'psychotic-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: My anxiety has been through the roof. I can't sleep, I'm always on edge, my heart races. But also — and this is the part I don't really tell anyone — I sometimes hear my grandmother's voice calling my name when I'm trying to fall asleep, and she died two years ago. I know that's not normal anxiety stuff.
